news.Title: 《韓股》消息面致先挫後揚，KOSPI收漲0.31%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:52:42 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(18)日走勢分歧。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7516.04點，上漲22.86點或0.31%，盤中最低觸及7142.71點、盤中高點為7636.20點；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1111.09點，下跌18.73點或1.66%。受到國際油價飆升與美國長短期公債利率大幅走高影響，開盤出現恐慌性拋售，一度觸發程式化交易暫停機制，隨後因政府對三星勞資分歧表態而改變風險預期，整體呈現高檔波動、指數走勢分歧的格局。

盤面上，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)與SK Hynix(000660.KS)在盤中遭遇急跌後出現明顯回補買盤，最終分別上漲3.88%、1.15%，Samsung Electronics Pfd(005935.KS)亦回升。市場報導指出，法院對Samsung Electronics勞資爭議相關禁制令，以及政府高層介入協調共同降低了對生產中斷的擔憂，促成大型半導體股的短暫抗跌。

此外，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)跌5.29%，HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)跌3.91%，LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)跌2.16%，顯示非半導體權值股承壓情況明顯。資金動向方面，盤面呈現外資持續撤離，散戶與機構接手的結構性特徵，程式化交易亦顯示非套利賣壓偏重，放大了盤中波動。

台股焦點：新產(2850.TW)

《韓股》KOSPI重挫逾6% 權值股走弱/類股齊跌

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 挖掘台積電外的優質企業 AI、璞玉要開創台股雙動能
news.Content:
台積電 在台股大盤指數漲跌擔任要角，常被稱為是「一個人的武林」；但台積電之外，台股組成的上市企業中不少是台灣各產業的冠軍，甚至是台積電強而有力的供應鏈。證交所今天(18日)舉行「AI領航x璞玉發光」開創台股雙動能新時代資本市場成長論壇，希望透過雙軌互動，形塑具成長及有韌性的台灣資本市場。

台北股市今年5月站上4萬點後持續創新高，AI相關科技股亮眼。為平衡資本市場，台灣證券交易所積極推廣還未被發掘的優質上市企業，由台灣指數公司在今年1月編制「台灣璞玉指數」，透過嚴謹篩選的機制，挑選出在各行業深耕且獲利穩定的「璞玉」企業，並進一步推出「璞玉中小型100指數」及「璞玉50指數」，提供市場更多元、更具抗跌及防禦能力的投資選擇。

證交所18日舉行「AI領航x璞玉發光」開創台股雙動能新時代資本市場成長論壇，希望透過雙軌互動，形塑具成長及有韌性的台灣資本市場。林修銘說：『(原音)接下來我們也會在5月20號來辦理一系列的璞玉指數成分股的業績發表會，邀請璞玉公司親自跟大家做說明，公司的未來的發展及展望。6月的Computex的展期中，我們也邀請台灣的AI產業界代表在國際舞台上齊聚交流，分享營運的績效跟台灣技術的優勢，向國內外再次展現我們台灣的硬實力及台灣資產產業多元發展的面貌。』

過往台股上漲總集中在台積電一家企業，不過，財訊雙週刊社長謝金河在論壇中指出，雖然目前台股資金仍集中在少數板塊，但近期也可以觀察到不只台積電受青睞，台積電強而有力的供應鏈也吸引到市場的目光。

舉例來說，像是中砂經過台積電培訓，成為台積電鑽石碟的最重要供應商，股價翻轉10多倍；另外，頌勝科技原本以生產鞋墊起家，後來成功轉型，目前核心業務為研發與製造半導體化學機械平坦化(CMP)研磨墊，為國內少數能打破美、日外商壟斷，切入台積電等先進製程供應鏈的關鍵耗材廠。另外還有新應材、山太士等許多台灣傳產企業華麗轉身後，股價從水餃股1元多翻千倍，躋身台股「千元俱樂部」，因此他認為台灣的傳產企業不能再坐等景氣變化，必須加緊技術升級與轉型，和台灣在掌握全球AI的關鍵地位中共同成長。

news.Title: Is Alibaba a Buy on AI and Cloud Upside Potential?
news.Content:
Despite reporting plummeting profitability in its recent fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report (for the period ended March 30), Alibaba (NYSE: BABA) shares jumped as investors were excited about the Chinese company's artificial intelligence (AI) road map. The stock is now trading around breakeven on the year, as of this writing.

Let's dig into the company's results and prospects to see if this is a good time to buy the stock.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

AI excitement

While Alibaba's AI-related product revenue saw triple-digit growth for the 11th straight quarter, it was the company's AI chip business that got investors excited. Management said Alibaba is the only company in China capable of producing custom AI chips at scale, which gives it a big structural cost advantage.

While most often compared to Amazon in the U.S., with its own leading AI model and custom chips, Alibaba is trying to take a page out of Alphabet 's book. It's embedded its Qwen AI model across its ecosystem and launched a range of enterprise products based on the model.

Overall, Alibaba's cloud intelligence segment revenue climbed by 38% to $6 billion. The segment's adjusted EBITA (earnings before interest, taxes, and amortization), meanwhile, surged by 57% to $550 million.

While Alibaba is seeing rapid cloud computing growth, its primary business is still its e-commerce operations. Unlike Amazon, whose cloud business is its biggest by profitability, the vast majority of Alibaba's profits and revenue still come from e-commerce. On this front, segment revenue rose 6% to $17.7 billion, while segment EBITA plunged 40% to $3.5 billion.

Quick commerce (delivery in one hour or less) helped power the revenue growth, with revenue soaring 57% to $2.9 billion. However, investments in this venture were also a big reason behind the drop in profitability.

Excluding quick commerce and wholesale revenue, Alibaba's e-commerce revenue fell 1%. The company's important third-party business revenue rose 1% to $10.6 billion. Direct sales fell 6% to $3.4 billion, and wholesale sales rose 3% to $861 million.

Overall, Alibaba's revenue rose by 3% to $35.3 billion, or 11% when excluding dispositions. Adjusted EBITDA (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization) plunged 61% to $2.4 billion, while its adjusted earnings per American depositary share (ADS) nosedived 95% to $0.01.

Story Continues

Is Alibaba stock a buy?

Alibaba's heavy investment cycle makes it a hard stock to read. Its core e-commerce business continues to struggle, so it is investing heavily in quick commerce to drive growth. The company expects to reach a scale where unit economics will be profitable by the end of 2027.

At the same time, it is also investing a boatload in AI and AI infrastructure. It has a great chance to become the AI leader in China, but this is still a relatively small part of its overall business.

As such, I'd remain on the sidelines until there is a clearer picture about the potential of these investments.

news.Title: 台股又爆下殺千點驚魂！注意看「3大防線」進場時機曝光
news.Content:
台股今（18日）盤中一度重挫超過千點，最低觸及40170.17點，險些摔破4萬點大關，即使最後狂拉僅下跌280.54點，但投資人對後市仍感到憂心，分析師江國中認為，本周台股有三道鋼鐵防線，分別是40576、39840以及39487，只要跌到附近，大盤的下檔空間極為有限。

台股修正 會殺到多慘？

摩爾投顧分析師江國中於今周刊專欄指出，等到下一次日線MACD柱狀體收腳的時候，只要柱狀體由長變短、跌勢趨緩，就是最強烈的止跌訊號。如果伴隨跳空缺口，就是多頭攻勢再起，上攻45000點的關鍵訊號。

台股近期漲多修正劇烈，雖屢屢挑戰站穩42000點關卡，但市場追價意願不高，上周周K線更是留下1200點的上引線，顯示上方賣壓沉重，加上美國通膨升高，30年期美債殖利率衝破5%，台股充斥獲利了結情緒。

最大敵人又來 後市不容樂觀

展望後市，在國際局勢尚未穩定之前，台股恐難避免震盪，甚至出現進一步回檔的可能性，本周關注重點在於輝達財報，預計在台灣時間周四（21日）上午出爐，相關概念股成為焦點。

另外，美國聯準會也會在周四公開4月利率決策會議的紀要，可以更明確了解聯準會官員們的立場，以及移交新主席華許（Kevin Warsh）前的討論細節，高度關注是否展現較為鷹派的說法或態度。

美國銀行分析師哈奈特（Michael Hartnett）則對金融市場提出警告，由於市場估值已高，通膨使30年期美債殖利率突破5%的生死線，投資人湧入股市和科技股的情緒接近尾聲，6月開始將是獲利了結的時機。

news.Title: CPO封測議題夯，封裝目標中介層層級，穎崴衝刺光電同測商機
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】股價超過萬元的測試介面廠穎崴(6515)積極爭取CPO商機，而2026年雖是被視為CPO技術商轉元年，但不論是封裝還是測試，均有技術門檻得跨過，封裝部分，台積電(2330)揭露COUPE今年將自on PCB推進到on substrate(載板)，但目標是on interposer(中介層)，而測試端，穎崴證實，得達到光電同測。人工智慧進入全新的發展階段，科技大廠指出，2027年全球AI基礎設施需求將達至少1兆美元，AI運算在過去兩年需求提升1萬倍，AI運算以翻倍方式增長爆發，矽光子及共同封裝光學可望成為延續這波需求算力提升的重要關鍵技術，雖然「銅退光進」已成產業重要趨勢，但業界均認為，短期內不可行，還會是處於「銅光並進」的架構。

共同封裝光學（Co-Packaged Optics）是將電子和光子積體電路共同封裝在同個中介層的技術，後者將光引擎直接搬到晶片旁，大幅縮短距離、功耗；同時晶圓大廠和IC設計大廠於近期紛紛展示CPO技術的原型，2026年被視為CPO技術商轉元年，更是技術邁向放量的關鍵年。光就封裝部分，CPO定義，是將Optical Engine(光學引擎)直接整合於Interposer，並與ASIC、HBM共同封裝，再透過載板整合。日前台積電釋出COUPE(緊湊型通用光子引擎)技術，也有技術進程，今年下半年能自on PCB推進到on substrate，但目標是on substrate。

而測試端，測試介面廠穎崴技術主管孫家彬在「CPO的進化論—矽光子的先進測試方法論（The Evolution of Co-Packaged Optics : Advanced Testing Methodologies for Silicon Photonics）」的演說中提到，進一步說明CPO為先進測試、高階封裝與半導體測試介面所帶來全新的機會與挑戰。

孫家彬表示，隨著矽光子指標大廠在CPO傳輸訂出更高規的頻寬（400G）及高速（224 Gbps/ 448Gbps）的規格，穎崴的CPO解決方案持續升級，從Wafer/Chip Level、Package Level到Module Level等三個測試級別推出相對應的解決方案。其中，WLCSP晶圓級探針卡（WLCSP Probe Card）部分，Wafer Level可用在「上電下光」的測試，Chip Level則可用在「上光下電」的解決方案；同時，穎崴獨創微間距對位雙邊探測系統解決方案（Double Sided Probing System Total Solution）則針對Package Level(封裝層級)提供的CPO測試；穎崴的跨世代超導測試座HyperSocket主攻Module Level(模組層級)的測試需求。穎崴在此大趨勢已做好準備，目標是能取得更全面性的光電同測市場商機。

news.Title: Trump tells Fortune he should have asked for bigger Intel stake
news.Content:
May 18 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump said he "should have asked for more" of a stake in ‌Intel on behalf of the U.S. government, in an ‌interview with Fortune magazine published on Monday.

The Trump administration last year took ​a 10% stake in Intel and announced an investment of about $10 billion in the chipmaker for building or expanding factories in the U.S.

Eight months after the deal, the government’s Intel position ‌has grown to ⁠be worth more than $50 billion.

"Do I get credit for it? Does anybody even know I did ⁠that?" Trump told Fortune.

When he was asked what the government’s exit strategy could be, the Fortune report said Trump believed he ​could ​sell shares slowly over time ​without causing the stock to ‌plummet.

Trump said: "Intel should be the biggest company in the world right now." Referring to TSMC 's chip dominance, he said: "Intel would have all that business now," had he been the president earlier.

"If I had been president when all these companies ‌started sending their chips in from ​China, I would have put a ​tariff on that would ​have protected Intel," he said.

Fortune said Trump ‌gave the interview before his first ​visit to ​Beijing since 2017. The visit ended on Friday with no major breakthroughs on trade or tangible help from Beijing ​to end the ‌more than two-month-old U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.

(Reporting by ​Ananya Palyekar and Akanksha Khushi in Bengaluru; Editing by ​Alex Richardson and Barbara Lewis)

news.Content:

news.Title: Elon Musk Says He Wants to Get SpaceX IPO Underway ‘Pretty Soon’
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk said he’s back in Texas working on plans for an initial public offering of SpaceX as the rocket and artificial intelligence company gears up for the largest listing of all time.

Most Read from Bloomberg

Winners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit Talks

Hormuz Oil Flows Creep Higher as More Supertankers Exit

US, Iran Stall on Hormuz Reopening as Oil Supplies Tighten

US and Iran Far From Deal as Bond Rout Piles Pressure on Trump

Trump Gets Revenge on Republican Who Voted to Convict Him

“We’ve got to get the SpaceX IPO stuff going here pretty soon,” the billionaire said, giving a reason for appearing virtually, instead of in person, at the Samson International Smart Mobility Summit in Tel Aviv on Monday.

Musk’s SpaceX, which has grown into one of the most influential companies in the space industry with billions of dollars in government contracts and considerable political sway, could file for an initial public offering as soon as this week, people familiar with the matter said. The rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company is seeking to raise as much as $75 billion on a valuation of more than $2 trillion, Bloomberg previously reported. That would make it the largest IPO of all time.

SpaceX is one of the companies helping to build out Donald Trump’s Golden Dome. The US Space Force has awarded $3.2 billion for prototypes of space-based interceptor prototypes — technology intended to destroy incoming missiles from orbit — to companies including SpaceX, Lockheed Martin Corp., Northrop Grumman Corp., RTX Corp. and Anduril Industries Inc.

Musk was one of the executives who traveled with Trump to China last week to join talks with Xi Jinping.

Tesla Inc., Musk’s electric car company and one of the most expensive stocks on the S&P 500, has pledged to spend more than $25 billion this year to help build up “physical AI” for automobiles and robotics.

Musk said on Monday that he sees driverless cars with no safety monitors operating “widespread in the US by the end of this year.”

“And hopefully in Israel too,” he said.

Musk said on an earnings call last month that Tesla wants to have “unsupervised” Robotaxis operating in “a dozen or so states by the end of this year.” Tesla has said the nascent ride-hailing business is on track to expand to Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa and Las Vegas in the first half of this year.

On the earnings call, Musk said the recent approval of Tesla’s controversial FSD driver-assistance product in the Netherlands sets the company up for “EU-wide approval” later in the second quarter. Tesla’s FSD software doesn’t render its vehicles autonomous and requires constant human supervision. In the announcement, the Dutch regulator noted the system approved in Europe is not the same version of FSD used in the US.

Story Continues

Musk is aiming for two expansions of his FSD software: The US expansion of FSD in Robotaxis under no supervision, and the use of FSD software in EU Tesla models, where the driver is alert and able to take control of the vehicle.

--With assistance from Dan Williams.

Most Read from Bloomberg Businessweek

Behind the Claude Frenzy That Ate Up All the Mac Minis

Disney Is Banking on Baby Yoda to Revive the Star Wars Franchise

Can Dallas Be the Next Las Vegas? The Mavericks Owner Is Betting On It

America Is Addicted to Disposable Work

The Tiny, Essential Building Blocks Powering the AI Boom

news.Title: 台股衝4萬點過熱？謝金河一句話定心丸 點名「5檔低調股」有看頭
news.Content:
台股躍上四萬點奔馳，引發外界熱議台股會不會過熱。財訊傳媒董事長謝金河今（18）日表示，現在台灣資本市場的根基比過去更穩，關鍵就在於台積電的基本面支撐。他指出，台積電第一季每股盈餘達22.08元，若全年EPS接近100元，即使股價來到2000元以上，仍有其合理性，「你說台積電要崩盤大跌，我認為不容易。」

謝金河指出，過去台股大漲後，市場往往擔心接下來就是崩盤，但這一次台灣資本市場的結構已經不同。台積電不只是台股權值核心，更是台灣產業、稅收與資本市場的重要支柱。只要台積電維持穩定，台股便具備相當強的支撐力。

謝金河更表示，台積電真正的影響力，還在於帶動整個供應鏈。他提到，台積電帶動的供應鏈公司有上百家，這也呼應證交所推動「璞玉計畫」的意義。台灣市場除了台灣50等大型權值股外，更應該讓具備成長潛力的中小型企業被投資人看見。

他還特別提及5檔深藏在傳統產業、卻因切入台積電本土供應鏈的潛力股，包括「中砂」、「新應材」、「碩成」、「高明鐵」、「三太士」。

談到台灣整體經濟表現，謝金河表示，今年台灣各項經濟數據表現出色，政府稅收也相當充裕，因此他建議，政府應重新思考財政資源的使用方式。他認為，與其每次都被動討論普發現金，不如把錢用在「刀口上」，例如提高公務人員、大學教授、醫護人員等薪資待遇。

謝金河也呼籲企業界，台灣企業近年獲利表現亮眼，除了回饋股東，也應讓員工共享企業成長成果。他以韓國SK海力士與三星為例指出，SK海力士因HBM業務表現亮眼，獲利大幅成長，進而提高員工分潤；相較之下，三星因業務範圍較廣，手機、面板等部門表現不一，導致內部薪酬分配壓力浮現，甚至引發員工不滿。

他提醒，台灣企業若獲利持續創高，老闆也應思考如何讓員工獲得更好回報，否則企業內部也可能出現分配不均的壓力。謝金河表示，這不只是企業治理問題，也是台灣下一階段經濟發展必須面對的重要課題。

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌近1%、連三跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:05:52 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(18)日走弱，連續三日下跌，呈現震盪整理格局。日經225指數收於60815.95點，下跌593.34點或0.97%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3826.51點，下跌37.46點或0.97%。整體賣壓主要受到原油價格走高、日美長期利率上升，以及地緣政治風險相關影響，使買盤動能明顯轉弱。

權值股與類股表現方面，AI與半導體相關權值股遭獲利了結，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)與東京威力科創(8035.JP)走弱，藤倉(5803.JP)與軟銀集團(9984.JP)也承壓；Recruit Holdings(6098.JP)、部分精密機器股及服務業相對抗跌。汽車類股與輸送用機器、紡織製品、批發業與建設業多數走弱。

《歐股》憂通膨失控、歐股挫 特諾本逆勢飆

《日股》權值股帶動，日經收漲0.84%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: A Kevin Warsh–Jerome Powell Fed Showdown Could Rattle Markets -- Here's What Investors Should Brace For
news.Content:
Most of us have heard the adage "out with the old, in with the new." But what happens when the "old" remains "in" alongside the "new"? We're about to find out with the changing of the guard at the Federal Reserve.

Jerome Powell's term as Fed Chair concluded on May 15, 2026. His replacement, Kevin Warsh, has officially taken the baton. For decades, previous Fed Chairs have stepped down from the Federal Reserve Board of Governors at the same time their term as Chair ended. But Powell is breaking that 78-year tradition.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Powell plans to stay on because the Trump administration's investigation into renovations of the Fed's headquarters and the president's personal attacks are "battering the institution and putting at risk the thing that really matters to the public, which is the ability to conduct monetary policy without taking into consideration political factors."

This unprecedented scenario of a longtime Fed Chair continuing to serve alongside a new Chair may set the stage for fireworks at the central bank like never seen before. And a showdown between Warsh and Powell could rattle markets.

Competing ideologies

Powell became Chair of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System on Feb. 15, 2018, after being nominated for the position by Trump in his first presidential term. Like his predecessors, he believed in using the Fed's capacity to set federal funds rates and its balance sheet to help stabilize the market, boost employment, and control inflation.

Warsh, on the other hand, wants to aggressively shrink the Fed's $6.7 trillion balance sheet and rely on setting rates to achieve monetary policy goals. He stated during his Senate confirmation hearings, "The balance sheet tool disproportionately helps those with financial assets. The interest rate tool hits the entire economy."

President Trump clearly wants Warsh to reduce interest rates and repeatedly criticized Powell for not doing so. Warsh's view that artificial intelligence (AI) is a "significant disinflationary force" could provide the flexibility to lower rates and satisfy the president. However, Powell has gone on record stating that AI is contributing to higher inflation.

Under Powell's helm, the Fed released its quarterly "dot plot" that revealed where each Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) member projected interest rates were headed (albeit anonymously). Powell also used his public statements to subtly telegraph coming Fed actions so that the markets weren't blindsided.

Story Continues

Warsh, though, has ridiculed the "dot plot" by calling it "central bank fast food." He also thinks the Fed communicates too much, telling the International Monetary Fund last year, "The central bank should find new comfort in working without applause and without the audience at the edge of its seats."

What investors should brace for

The competing ideologies held by Warsh and Powell could lead to a showdown between the two men and their allies in the coming months. But would a Warsh-Powell clash rattle markets? Bet on it.

For one thing, markets hate uncertainty -- both the stock market and the bond market. If the Fed is less communicative with Warsh as Chair, Wall Street won't like it. It wouldn't be shocking, though, if Powell or other FOMC members who share his views tried to telegraph future Fed moves that investors prefer. The downside to this approach, though, is that it could set the stage for heightened animosity among the Federal Reserve Governors, which would add more uncertainty.

An even bigger confrontation could come if Powell believes that Warsh is acting in a way that compromises the Fed's political independence. We may see a full-blown battle at the Fed if Warsh pushes for further rate cuts while inflation continues to rise and the jobs market is strong. Whichever side wins this battle, the tumult would almost certainly lead to increased stock market volatility.

Increased bond market volatility seems likely if Warsh achieves his goal of aggressively shrinking the Fed's balance sheet. Higher long-term yields are likely to result from this move.

Smart steps to take

Investors can take several smart steps to prepare for a possible Warsh-Powell conflict at the Fed. One thing to do is to increase your cash position. If markets are indeed rattled by the current and previous Fed Chairs butting heads, the stocks of excellent companies could become available at attractive prices.

Another good move is to reduce your exposure to stocks that are highly sensitive to overall market volatility. The best stocks to own in such an environment are high-quality stocks with strong fundamentals, especially those in defensive sectors.

Probably the most important thing for investors to do, though, is avoid overreacting. Policy clashes already happen within the Fed. Markets adapt to new central bank policies. And who knows -- maybe Warsh and Powell will sing from the same hymnbook more than anyone expects.

Don’t miss this second chance at a potentially lucrative opportunity

Ever feel like you missed the boat in buying the most successful stocks? Then you’ll want to hear this.

On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a “Double Down” stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you’re worried you’ve already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it’s too late. And the numbers speak for themselves:

Nvidia: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2009, you’d have $584,450 !*

Apple: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2008, you’d have $57,222 !*

Netflix: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2004, you’d have $469,293 !*

Right now, we’re issuing “Double Down” alerts for three incredible companies , available when you join Stock Advisor , and there may not be another chance like this anytime soon.

news.Title: Here's What I Think Is Going on With Sandisk Stock
news.Content:
What's the biggest winner among S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) members so far this year? It isn't Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) or any of the other so-called "Magnificent Seven" stocks . Instead, it's a stock that has only been trading publicly for less than 15 months -- Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) .

Even after a recent pullback, Sandisk's shares have still soared higher than those of any other S&P 500 stock. But what's actually driving the impressive rally? Can the momentum continue, or is a steeper sell-off imminent? Here's what I think is going on with Sandisk stock.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need.

Continue »

Sandisk's surge is justified

First things first: Sandisk's tremendous performance isn't a fluke. This isn't a meme stock. I believe that Sandisk's surge is justified.

The numbers back me up. Sandisk's revenue for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 skyrocketed 97% from the previous quarter . That growth came on top of a 31% sequential increase in fiscal Q2. The company expects revenue to rise by another 34% in Q4 at the midpoint of its guidance range.

It's no secret why Sandisk's business is booming. Demand for the NAND memory the company makes is soaring, primarily because it's a critical component of artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure. Sandisk CEO David Goeckeler accurately stated in the latest quarterly update that his company's NAND products are "recognized as an industry gold standard."

Granted, investor psychology is also at play. When a stock takes off as much as Sandisk has, some investors have FOMO (fear of missing out) and jump on the bandwagon. This creates a loop that further fuels momentum.

However, Sandisk emphatically isn't benefiting from any appreciable short squeeze (at least not yet). Short interest in the stock has risen significantly this year. If a short squeeze were underway, we would have seen the number decline.

The risks are real

While Sandisk's rally is real, so are its risks. I suspect that some investors are downplaying those risks more than they should.

One key risk is that Sandisk's growth prospects are now largely baked into its share price. Wall Street seems to share this opinion. The consensus 12-month price target for the stock is barely above the current price.

Interest rates could be another potential problem. Inflation is rearing its ugly head again, even as employment remains strong. This double whammy could ultimately prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. If rates rise, enterprise spending could slow -- and affect Sandisk's growth.

Story Continues

Sandisk also remains a cyclical stock . Memory market upcycles eventually give way to downcycles. AI hasn't ended this cyclicality. Sooner or later, supply will catch up to and surpass demand. When it happens (if not before), Sandisk's momentum will evaporate.

My take on Sandisk

What do I think is going on with Sandisk? Perhaps most importantly, I see the company as a bona fide transformation story. The Sandisk of 2026 isn't the same as the Sandisk before it was gobbled up by Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) in 2016.

I also view the AI boom as a game changer for the NAND market. Sandisk is deservedly the biggest winner from this major shift. It rightfully deserves to be called an AI stock now.

What especially stands out to me is that Sandisk is signing multi-year supply agreements -- three in Q3 and two more in Q4 as of April 30, 2026. This underscores just how much AI has changed the dynamics of the NAND market.

But (you probably knew a "but" was coming), the margin of safety associated with buying Sandisk stock is much smaller than it was a few months ago. I don't think current shareholders should run for the hills because I don't think the current memory upcycle will end anytime soon. However, waiting for a larger pullback before buying additional shares or initiating a new position is the smartest strategy, in my opinion.

news.Title: Prediction: Nvidia's Stock Will Soar After May 20
news.Content:
May 20 is going to be a big day for Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) shareholders, but also for every investor. Nvidia has grown to become a massive $5 trillion company that is a huge part of every major stock index. So, if Nvidia does well, so does the whole market. If Nvidia skips a beat, the broader market will also take a hit. Luckily for investors, I think good news is coming after market close on May 20 that could cause the stock to soar on May 21.

Nvidia reports its first-quarter earnings on May 20, and if history is any indicator, the stock could be in for a wide move. I think the situation looks pretty similar to years past, making Nvidia an excellent candidate to soar after beating expectations.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Nvidia has a history of outperforming expectations

Over the past year, Nvidia has consistently outperformed Wall Street analysts' expectations. This stems from the fact that AI demand has always exceeded what everyone expected, and all the signs are there for Nvidia to do it again.

AI demand is still high, and companies like Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) have already boosted their capital expenditure guidance for 2026 due to higher data center component pricing. While Meta wasn't specific about which component that was, it shows that there's a general lack of supply of computing equipment compared to demand. As a result, supplier Nvidia's business should remain strong and will likely deliver an earnings beat.

As another positive note, Wall Street analysts are already bullish on the ongoing quarter. They estimate Nvidia's Q2 revenue growth rate will be about 86% -- an acceleration from Q1's expected 79%. We'll see on May 20 how that aligns, but all of it adds up to Nvidia being one of the most dominant companies in the market.

Another reason I'm confident we will see a spike in stock price following earnings is the stock's valuation history. Historically, Nvidia has traded at a fairly low forward price-to-earnings ratio at the start of the year. Then, following Q1 earnings, the stock rallies throughout the summer, increasing its valuation. If Nvidia works toward its normal mark of trading at 40 times forward earnings or a greater valuation point to end the year, that means there's significant upside from now until the end of 2026. If Nvidia confirms that demand remains strong, then a continued rally should be in store following Q1's announcement.

Story Continues

We're already seeing the start of that pattern repeat, and if Nvidia can deliver a solid quarter, I think we could see a pretty large jump in share price.

We'll find out what the outcome is for Nvidia's stock following earnings, but there's enough long-term demand that I think it's well worth buying and holding now , as the AI build-out is far from wrapped up.

news.Title: 台股一度重挫逾千點 三大法人賣超434億 外資大砍452億
news.Content:
台股今（18）日開低震盪，盤中一度下挫逾1000點，終場以40891點作收，成交量9904.66億元。三大法人合計賣超434.5億元，其中外資大賣452.41億元。

觀察籌碼動向，今日自營商賣超139.26億元，投信買超157.17億元，外資及陸資賣超452.41億元，合計賣超434.5億元。

權值股中，台積電開低震盪，下跌25元，收2240元，鴻海收平盤來到248.5元，聯發科則來到3400元，上漲4.29%。

受惠於AI浪潮與元件需求，被動元件概念股延續漲勢，國巨*、金山電攻漲停，立隆電大漲8.29%，華新科漲5.58%，興勤也有2.67%的漲幅。

此外，受SpaceX最快將於6月提早登陸那斯達克的消息激勵，低軌衛星族群全面走強，事欣科、華通、敬鵬、耀登、昇達科、啟碁等衝漲停，兆赫也有逾6%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 台股衝破4萬點！0050現在能買嗎？專家揭搭配「1投資組合」很重要
news.Content:
隨著台股衝破4萬點大關，市場情緒沸騰到最高點，街頭巷尾、網路論壇處處都在討論投資熱潮，許多投資人擔心錯過行情，紛紛進場買股，但也有不少人心中浮現疑問：「0050現在還能買嗎？」《優活健康網》特別摘錄投資專家雨果所撰寫的文章，分享ETF背後運轉機制，其實影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點。

0050現在還能買嗎？

很多人在0050創高後，心裡第一個浮現的問題通常是「現在還能不能買」，尤其看到新聞天天在討論台股創新高，很多人難免會開始擔心是不是已經太晚進場。這種情緒其實很常見，因為大部分人對投資的直覺，通常都是「漲高了就危險」。

但如果回頭看過去的歷史，會發現0050在很多階段都曾被認為太貴。30元的時候有人嫌高，50元的時候也有人不敢買。甚至當0050突破100元時，市場依然充滿「現在進場會套牢」的聲音。只是多年後回頭看，那些高點很多最後都變成相對低點。

這也是指數化投資很有趣的地方。長期向上的關鍵，通常不是短期價格，而是企業獲利是否持續成長。0050本質上，其實就是台灣前50大市值企業的集合。它的核心邏輯，某種程度上是在押注台灣大型企業未來的競爭力。

只是現在的0050，與過去有一個很大的不同。那就是台積電的權重已經越來越高，目前0050的台積電權重很接近60%。換句話說，0050的走勢，與半導體產業已經高度連動。

這也讓現在的0050，比較像大型科技股ETF。不完全是過去大家印象中的「平均分散投資」。有些人看到這樣的集中度，會開始擔心風險。因為如果未來科技產業進入修正，波動可能也會變大。

影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點

但另一派看法則認為，這其實只是市場自然演變的結果，因為市值型ETF本來就是誰強誰權重高。這幾年AI產業快速成長，半導體企業獲利大幅提升，資金自然會集中在最具競爭力的企業。所以0050權重變化，本質上比較像市場投票的結果，而不是經理人主動偏好某些公司。

只是很多投資人容易忽略一件事。真正影響投資結果的，往往不是進場點，而是能不能長期持有。因為市場大漲時，幾乎每個人都覺得自己能長期投資，真正困難的，通常是在市場下跌的時候。

像2008年金融海嘯時，台股曾經大跌超過50%。2022年美國升息循環時，科技股也曾出現劇烈修正。即使是長期向上的資產，中間依然可能經歷很大的波動，而很多人往往是在這個階段離開市場。

有人原本規劃長期投資，但當帳面虧損20%、30%後，開始出現焦慮與不安。有些人會擔心工作收入，也有人開始懷疑市場是不是要崩盤，最後不是輸給市場本身，而是輸給情緒與資金安排。

搭配保守資產也很重要

所以投資人應該要思考一件事。除了0050之外，是否也要搭配一部分保守資產。 這種做法不是看空市場，比較像是替未來的不確定性保留空間。因為保守資產最大的作用，很多時候不是提高報酬，而是降低整體波動與心理壓力。

例如有人會保留部分現金。因為現金除了流動性，也代表未來的選擇權。當市場修正時，有現金的人通常比較不容易恐慌。甚至還有機會慢慢分批投入。但如果資金全部壓在股票，市場一跌，壓力可能就會明顯放大。尤其當生活開銷與投資資金沒有切開時。

另外也有人會配置部分債券ETF。像是美國公債、

news.Title: 《台股盤後》回測月線、收跌280點；下影線逾700點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 15:45:54 新聞中心 發佈

美股上周五在各期公債殖利率明顯走揚下皆收黑、亞幣/亞股與美股電子盤今(18)日也多為弱勢表現，台股則亦以低盤開出、回測月線支撐，且19大類股中更僅對指數貢獻不大的其他、建材營造收紅，導致加權指數早盤一度跌逾千點，惟在聯電不受台積賣世界影響、開低走高收漲0.9%，搭配聯發科挾GOOGLE I/O大會將登場而收漲逾4%，輔以昇達科等衛星股、被動元件漲價題材的國巨*等強勢表現，終場加權指數收在40891.82點，下跌280.54點或0.68%、留下逾700點的下影線，成交量9904.66億元。

受到油價跳高引發全球通膨疑慮、公債殖利率跳升衝擊，美國四大指數15日全面拉回。亞洲股市方面，因日本10年債殖利率揚升，半導體相關股下挫，拖累日經225指數今日以低盤開出後、一度重挫逾1,000點，終場下跌0.97%；韓國綜合股價指數(KOSPI) 今日走勢震盪，終場上漲0.31%，主要係三星上漲逾3%。

台股市場氣氛偏向保守，賣壓主要集中在權值股與短線漲多族群。電子族群普遍走弱，台積電收在2240元，下跌1.1%，日月光投控跌逾6%，鴻勁、金像電、台達電、致茂、創意、南亞科、廣達等都收黑，不過聯發科盤中由黑翻紅，上漲4.29%。另外，被動元件今日獲買盤點火，國巨*亮燈漲停，禾伸堂、金山電、光頡、台嘉碩、大毅等也都衝上漲停，同時SPACE X下月將掛牌帶動昇達科收漲停、群創漲逾7%。

在類股表現上，造紙、化工股表現疲軟，分別下跌2.56%、2.1%，正隆、長興均跌逾6%，勝一、永光、國精化、永豐餘等都走弱。紡織纖維、化學生技醫療、電機機械、汽車類股也都有超過1%的跌幅，表現相對弱勢。而四大表現最佳類股依序為數位雲端上漲1.4%，主要係受基本面題材帶動；其他類股則在三貝德漲停、弱勢股寶成反彈激勵下收漲0.91%；綠能環保在政策支持與相關訂單消息下、上揚0.90%；光電類股在供應鏈逐步調整後則出現溫和回穩，上漲0.37%。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計賣超434.5億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)賣超452.4億元，投信買超157.17億元，自營商賣超139.26億元。

台股焦點：光頡(3624.TW)

台股焦點：立敦(6175.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 微軟明明賺翻！比爾蓋茲基金賣光持股為哪樁？「台股代工、散熱等AI鏈老神在在」專家：盯住2大實質指標更要緊
news.Content:
根據美國證券交易委員會（SEC）最新公告，蓋茲基金會信託（Gates Foundation Trust）已將持有的微軟（Microsoft）股票全部清倉，持股數量正式歸零，此舉代表比爾．蓋茲慈善體系正式結束了與他共同創立的微軟公司之間長達數十年的股權連結。

蓋茲信託基金會將原本持有的 2,850萬股微軟股票陸續減持，直到近期將最後剩餘的770萬股，價值約32億美元全數賣出，正式達成「零持股」；根據財經媒體 分析報導，此舉並非代表比爾．蓋茲看壞微軟或AI未來發展，而是出於理財規劃。

然比爾．蓋茲（Bill Gates）本人並未賣光微軟股票，此次「股票歸零」指的是基金會信託帳戶，根據最新金融數據，比爾．蓋茲個人目前仍持有微軟約1.03億股的股票，總市值高達約430億美元，仍是微軟最重要的個人大股東之一。

比爾．蓋茲過去公開承諾，計畫在2045年前逐步結束基金會運作，根據這項「落日計畫」，基金會必須在未來不到20年內，將所有數千億美元的資產全數投入慈善用途，而非永久保留基金規模，本次出清持股，完全符合其長期支出與逐步解散的既定時程。

為了擴大全球慈善影響力，其基金會預計將年度捐款金額提升至90億美元，折合新台幣 約2,900億元，這種極高強度的撥款時程需要大量且靈活的現金流，因此信託將原本集中度最高的微軟股票變現，以直接支持醫療、教育和氣候變遷等慈善專案。

微軟過去幾年在雲端與AI領域表現亮眼，營收與利潤皆創下歷史級別的高點，基金會選擇在微軟估值處於歷史相對高檔的兩年內，採取分批減持，從2,850萬股降至零股，能將利潤鎖定在極佳的位置，實現利益最大化。

台股與微軟連結最深的是AI伺服器供應鏈與AI PC概念股，微軟在雲端運算（Azure）與AI生態圈的霸主地位依然非常穩固；微軟持續在全球大舉擴建資料中心（Data Center），其資本支出（Capex）依然保持在高水位，繼續對台灣的鴻海（2317）、廣達（2382）、緯創（3231）、英業達（2356）等伺服器組裝大廠大量拉貨。

微軟自研AI晶片如 Maia晶片等，同樣仰賴台積電的先進製程與先進封裝（CoWoS），而運算所需的高階散熱組件如奇鋐（3017） 與雙鴻（3324）也未受股權異動影響。

投資專家表示，微軟主導的AI PC浪潮正在推進，其近年強力主導的Copilot+ PC架構是刺激台灣電子產業復甦的新引擎，比起老創辦人慈善基金會的賣股消息，台股AI族群走勢更受到微軟未來的季度財報、輝達（Nvidia）最新晶片的出貨進度等實質經濟指標牽動。

news.Title: 受益人會議通過！群益00685L擬分割1拆24 將成最便宜正2台股ETF
news.Content:
根據群益投信官網公告資訊顯示，其所經理之「群益臺灣加權指數 ETF 傘型證券投資信託基金之群益臺灣加權指數單日正向 2 倍證券投資信託基金 (00685L-TW)」已於今年 5 月 15 日召開受益人會議，分割決議案順利通過。由於 00685L 發行價 10 元，是市場上台股正二 ETF 中最低的，因此，分割後將可能成為市場上最能小資入手的台股正二 ETF。

根據 00685L 信託契約及公開說明書相關規範，分割比例應為整數倍數，且經受益人會議通過分割決議之結帳後每受益權單位淨資產價值 (即淨值)，應大於或等於初次發行價格 (即 10 元)，以受益人會議當日 (5/15) 之每受益權單位淨資產價值為 243.05 元來看，00685L 將有機會 1 拆分為 24，分割後市價將接近原發行價，可大幅降低投資門檻，促使更多投資人參與，提升流動性。

ETF 理財達人表示，台股正 2 ETF 具備「每日重新平衡」的機制，在股市上漲的趨勢中，這個機制會自動將昨天的獲利滾入今天的本金 (等於天天自動加碼)。因此在多頭趨勢，正 2 ETF 的長期累積報酬率往往會遠大於原型指數的兩倍。

以群益 00685L 為例，截至 5 月 15 日，上市表現以來上漲 2373.29% 遠大於台灣加權報酬指數同期間報酬 478.49% 的 2 倍 (956.98%) 的報酬，在 AI 硬體需求爆發的投資趨勢下，對於具有資本成長需求的投資人，除了運用市值型 ETF 以外，也可選擇投資正 2ETF。

根據群益投信官網先前公告資料，00685L 拆分預估重要時程分別為，5/18 公告決議結果、6/4 公告分割比率與日程、6/30 最後交易日、7/1 至 7/6 停止申贖與交易、7/3 至 7/6 停止過戶、7/7 恢復申贖、交易、借券、過戶。

不過，群益投信 00685L 於 5/15 通過受益人大會，後續將依據決議結果進行分割作業，分割比率及相關日程也將另行公告，提醒投資人關於 00685L 分割之實際日程還是要以群益投信網站公告為主。

news.Title: 不蓋房改當股神？ 皇翔狂砸126億買台積電 海撈7.7億狠甩本業獲利
news.Content:
台股近年在AI題材帶動下漲勢驚人，不只散戶掀起全民炒股熱潮，就連建商也加入「股海淘金」行列。根據《經濟日報》報導，上市建商皇翔建設近年大舉進軍股市，今年以來光投資台積電、台達電、南亞科與旺宏等個股，累計交易金額便超過126億元，甚至遠高於購地金額，成為市場熱議焦點。

馨傳不動產智庫執行長何世昌指出，去年以來台股表現強勢，大量資金湧入股市，不只一般投資人熱衷操作股票，連房地產相關資金也逐漸轉向股市。尤其目前房市買氣轉弱，市場主力僅剩自住客，與過去投資客主導時期相比，自住買方有更多時間慢慢挑選物件，也更清楚自身需求，因此成交精準度較去年提高約1至2成。

觀察公開資訊觀測站資料，皇翔建設堪稱建商界的「投資高手」。早在2020年全民瘋航運股的「航海王時代」，皇翔便開始積極布局台股，近年更鎖定AI概念與大型權值股，包括台積電與台達電等標的。

其中，今年截至5月15日止，皇翔針對台積電、台達電、南亞科與旺宏四檔股票的累積交易金額已突破126億元，相較之下，今年4月才以34.579億元購入土城頂福段約3359坪土地，顯示其投入股市的資金規模，甚至遠超過本業土地投資。

值得注意的是，皇翔首季財報本業仍小虧448.6萬元、每股淨損0.01元，但靠著股市操作大賺逾7億元，獲利規模遠超本業表現，也讓市場戲稱皇翔投資部門簡直像「另類投顧公司」。

何世昌18日也在 《何世昌的房產知識Buffet+》 粉專上表示，「這年頭，全民瘋炒股，連建商也不想努力了，紛紛加入股市大軍行列，投資獲利還比賣房子多。房子難賣又難賺，正經人都去玩股票了，誰還賣房子？」

他表示雖然AI產業很強，台灣經濟發展強勁，「但花無百日紅，沒有每天過年的，股市投資跟買房一樣要量力而為，不要過度槓桿。」他看到近期以來，不少銀行其他類不限用途貸款額度被借光光，有些民眾借了錢用融資買股票，或者是用現股質押再去買股票，槓桿開到N倍大，「只看見獲利期望值卻忽略了風險，這是很危險的行為。即便現在股市泡沫風險不高，還是要小心上沖下洗、震盪劇烈。槓桿玩過頭，小心一夜回到解放前啊。」

（封面圖／翻攝自Google Maps）

news.Content: By Wayne Cole SYDNEY, May 18 (Reuters) - Asian share markets were on the skids on Monday as fresh drone attacks in the Gulf shoved oil prices and bond yields higher, while the AI euphoria underpinning the tech bull run will be tested by earnings from Nvidia this week. A drone strike caused a fire at a nuclear power plant in the United Arab ‌Emirates, while Saudi Arabia reported intercepting three drones, as U.S. President Donald Trump warned that Iran must act "fast" to reach a deal. More from Yahoo Scout What earnings will ...

• The Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed, leading to rapidly draining global oil inventories and concerns of price spikes to $130-140pb.
• Bond markets were hit hard, with US 10-year yields reaching a 15-month high, raising fears of central bank tightening and potential recession.
• Asian markets, including Japan, South Korea, and China, experienced declines, with China's retail sales and industrial output showing sluggish growth.

• 勞動部公布最新無薪假數據，實施家數及人數均減少。
• 學者擔憂中東戰事升溫可能引發輸入性通膨及經濟放緩的停滯性通膨風險。
news.Keywords: 台股,美股,地緣政治,通膨風險,產業資金流向

news.Title: This "Sleeper" Stock Could Be the Surprise Winner of 2026

news.Title: 研華AI應用層擁極深護城河，「像台積電一樣」，董座看好股價長期發展
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者王宜弘報導】IPC龍頭研華(2395)董事長劉克振看好邊緣AI落地應用在養龍蝦風潮起飛之後即將爆發，研華軟硬體全面撒網，誓言成 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 劉克振認為研華在AI第五層蛋糕（應用層）擁有極深護城河，並將其比擬為台積電（2330）在半導體領域的精神。
• 研華透過其工業級邊緣AI平台WISE，導入AI Agent後推出WEDA開發架構，加速實體AI與產業智慧化應用落地。
• 研華設定下一個五年計劃（2026-2030年），爭取成為Application平台領導廠商世界第一。
• 公司看好股價長期發展，認為產業趨勢對且護城河明顯。
news.Keywords: 邊緣AI,應用層,平台領導者,護城河,長期發展

news.Title: 國產嘉太廠大啖先進封裝建廠紅利，AI浪潮助攻出貨登頂
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者張家瑋報導】預拌混凝土廠國產(2504)旗下嘉太廠憑藉絕對的地利優勢與高強度科技行控供應力，成功卡位台積電(2330 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 國產（2504）旗下嘉太廠因地利優勢及高強度供應力，成功卡位台積電（2330）嘉科廠先進封裝廠建廠供應鏈。
• 台積電嘉科一期規劃的兩座先進封裝廠，混凝土總需求量高達80萬立方米，為國產帶來龐大業績支撐。
• 嘉太廠高峰期單月出貨量曾達6萬立方米，平均月出貨量衝上5萬立方米，成為集團年度出貨王。
• 高科技廠辦混凝土供應占比已拉高至60%，預計台積電嘉科二期將再掀起新一波混凝土搶料大戰。
• 法人看好國產透過低碳高端混凝土研發優勢與多廠產能協同效應，營運前景與出貨動能將持續登頂。
news.Keywords: 先進封裝,建廠供應鏈,混凝土需求,營運前景,出貨動能

news.Title: 美債油價夾擊美股 台股開低震盪一度狂瀉逾千點驚魂未定
news.Content:
商傳媒 ｜記者顏康寧／台北報導

美伊中東衝突未解，國際油價彈升，加上美國公債殖利率走高，美股科技股上週五回檔，牽動台股今天早盤震盪加劇。台股18日開盤跌破41000點整數關卡，盤中一度下探40170.17點，下跌1002.1 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受美伊衝突、國際油價上漲及美債殖利率走高影響，台股早盤震盪加劇，一度下探40170.17點，下跌超過千點。
• 盤中權值股跌幅收斂，電子指數、金融指數及櫃買指數跌幅縮小。
• 台積電（2330.TW）早盤最低2215元，盤中回到2250元，跌幅收斂至0.66%。
• 聯發科（2454.TW）、聯電（2303.TW）逆勢走揚，鴻海（2317.TW）盤中翻紅。
• 低軌衛星概念股受SpaceX上市題材激勵，表現強勢。
news.Keywords: 台股,美股,地緣政治,原物料價格,債券殖利率

news.Title: 台股開盤慘跌千點原因曝光！高檔AI股太危險？「避險大戶今天不買台積電」資金全哄搶這檔低調權值股
news.Content: 美國與伊朗的緊張局勢未見緩和，直接衝擊全球金融市場的風險偏好，加上地緣衝突導致國際避險情緒蔓延，日股與韓股今（18）日開盤同步續挫，台股也難逃一劫，開盤重挫並一度大跌超過1,000點，然 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受地緣政治緊張局勢影響，台股開盤重挫逾千點，但隨後跌幅收斂，市場資金湧入AI供應鏈，顯示對基本面重視度提升。
• 聯電因具備低本益比與穩健殖利率優勢，成為避險資金與投信的青睞標的，顯示市場偏好防禦性權值股。
• 電子通路族群如擎亞、增你強等股價上漲，暗示下游拉貨動能強勁，緩解市場對基本面轉弱的擔憂。
• 分析師建議觀察2至3天，確認大盤站穩5日線且國際局勢緩和後再行加碼，避免盲目搶反彈。
• 法人認為，儘管短期受通膨與地緣政治干擾，但半導體與AI產業基本面強勁，中長期多頭目標不變，急跌是買點。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治,AI供應鏈,基本面,權值股,避險

news.Title: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Supply Chain Finance Platform Selected by Glencore for $2.55B Program
news.Content: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE: FIS ) is one of the best low priced technology stocks to buy according to hedge funds . On May 12, FIS announced that its Supply Chain Finance Platform, formerly known ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has been selected by Glencore to power an inaugural $2.55 billion trade receivables securitization program for its oil and gas business.
• The FIS Supply Chain Finance Platform, hosted on Microsoft Azure, enables corporates to monetize receivables and unlock working capital.
• This transaction, backed by a consortium of six financial institutions, is one of the largest oil and gas trade receivables transactions executed.
• The platform provides technology infrastructure, operational support, and complex reporting for multi-jurisdictional transactions, offering real-time monitoring and transparency.
news.Keywords: supply chain finance, securitization, working capital, financial technology, cloud hosting

news.Title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Launches Compute Scale-Up Server 3250 for Critical Workloads
news.Content: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE: HPE ) is one of the best low priced technology stocks to buy according to hedge funds . On May 11, HPE announced the availability of the HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3250, a purpose-built server designed for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has launched the HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3250, designed for large, in-memory databases and critical business workloads.
• The server is powered by Intel Xeon 6 processors and features a modular architecture scaling from 4 to 16 sockets, supporting up to 64 TB of DDR5 memory.
• It is engineered for high performance in applications like enterprise resource planning and emerging agentic AI workloads, with advanced security and resiliency features.
• The system is the first scale-up server validated by the SAP BW Edition HANA benchmark with at least 48 TB of memory, offering significant performance boosts.
news.Keywords: server technology, in-memory databases, critical workloads, AI hardware, enterprise solutions

news.Title: 台股盤中重挫千點！低點反彈6百點　分析師提醒提高警覺
news.Content:
美股上週五全面拉回，跌幅1％起跳，費城半導體更是大4％，台積電跌幅也達3.2％，衝擊台股今天大跌，早盤甚至一度重挫超過千點，指數下探40170點，稍後，買盤進場承接，跌點收斂，截至發稿為止，低點反彈超過6百點，但仍下跌超過3百點。

摩爾 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 建議避開高本益比、低殖利率、法人轉賣的高位階股，轉而布局低本益比、高殖利率的價值型股票。
• 今年前四月台股基金報酬率表現亮眼，遠優於大盤，顯示主動型基金具備超額報酬能力。
• AI趨勢為台股提供延續性獲利上修動能，產業結構改變，高效能運算營收已超越智慧型手機，出口成長穩健。
• 市場預期台股AI供應鏈今年仍可維持20%至60%的盈餘成長，涵蓋先進製程、半導體材料、伺服器等領域。
news.Keywords: 漲多拉回,價值型股票,AI趨勢,盈餘成長,主動基金

news.Title: 聯發創新基地攜手賽微科技　推動AI商業落地
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月18日電）聯發科 (2454) 今天宣布，旗 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 雙方將結合聯發創新基地的在地化AI模型研發能量，以及賽微科技的企業AI平台落地經驗。
• 雙方將於5月20日舉辦「AI Technology Meetup」活動，深入探討技術研發與產業實務。
• 聯發創新基地將分享語音聊天機器人開發實務，展現其在語音模型技術的實力。
• 賽微科技將從商業實戰角度，解析AI對企業決策與營運模式的影響，引導企業制定應對策略。
news.Keywords: AI落地,策略合作,企業AI平台,模型研發,商業實戰

news.Title: Microchip Tech (MCHP) Reports Strong Q4 and FY 2026 Results, Exceeding EPS Guidance
news.Content: Microchip Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MCHP ) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $100 . On May 7, Microchip reported FQ4 2026 net sales of $1.311 billion, up 35.1% year-over-year, with GAAP EPS of $0.21 and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microchip Technology (MCHP) reported strong FQ4 2026 results with net sales of $1.311 billion, up 35.1% year-over-year, exceeding EPS guidance.
• For FY 2026, net sales increased 7.1% to $4.713 billion, with non-GAAP EPS of $1.64.
• The company is increasing factory utilization due to improving demand, normalizing customer inventory, and design wins in data center and AI applications.
• FQ1 2027 guidance forecasts net sales midpoint of $1.456 billion (11% sequential increase) and non-GAAP EPS of $0.67-$0.71, with gross margins between 62.25%-63.25%.
news.Keywords: semiconductor, earnings, revenue growth, AI applications, guidance

news.Title: 台灣晶片優勢恐倒數18個月？美專家驚曝「1到2奈米差距」
news.Content: 台積電是台灣的護國神山和矽盾，在全球科技與地緣政治中扮演關鍵地位，但美國創投家帕里哈皮提亞在最新《All-In Podcast》節目中指出，18個月後台 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國創投家認為，18個月後台灣可能因美國本土半導體產業成長及中美自主供應鏈建立，失去戰略重要性。
• 專家指出，美國距離建立完整本土高階晶片能力僅剩「1到2奈米」差距，一旦突破，對台灣產能依賴將大幅下降。
• 全球半導體供應鏈正朝「去集中化」發展，美國與大陸加速自主半導體產業，削弱台灣作為全球核心供應樞紐的重要性。
• 有評論者反駁此觀點，認為台灣的戰略重要性不僅限於晶片，批評此論調在戰略與道德上極度貧乏。
• 專家認為，華為投入巨資發展本土晶片，台積電美國新廠已開始生產，顯示去中心化趨勢。
news.Keywords: 半導體戰略,自主供應鏈,去集中化,技術差距,地緣政治風險

news.Title: 〈焦點股〉台積電擬出售持股 世界跌停深鎖 三家子公司同步重挫
news.Content: 台積電 (2330-TW)(TSM-US) 上周宣布計畫出售世界先進 (5347-TW) 約 8.1% 的持股，將資源專注在核心業務 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電計畫出售世界先進約8.1%持股，以專注核心業務，此舉導致世界先進股價跳空跌停。
• 此利空消息亦衝擊台積電集團子公司，包括創意、精材、采鈺股價全面重挫，精材打入跌停。
• 台積電此次出售世界先進持股約15.2萬張，持股比將從27.1%降至約19%，預計交易金額約241.45億至295.11億元。
• 若以176.5元為交易價格計算，台積電處分利益約達718.16億元。
• 儘管台積電強調不影響與世界先進的策略合作，市場反應仍劇烈，世界先進股價深鎖跌停。
news.Keywords: 股權處分,核心業務,集團子公司,財務投資,股價重挫

news.Title: 抄底王Q1加碼亞馬遜、半導體股 清倉航空股
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 11:54:51 黃智勤 發佈

有「華爾街抄底王」之稱的知名投資人泰珀(David Tepper)首季大舉加碼科技巨頭亞馬遜(Amazon)和叫車平台Ub ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 知名投資人泰珀（David Tepper）首季大舉加碼科技巨頭亞馬遜(Amazon)和叫車平台Uber。
• 泰珀也增持了Sandisk、美光(Micron)和台積電(2330)等半導體股，顯示對AI基建和記憶體市場的看好。
• 當季泰珀大舉減碼中概股，並將手上三檔航空股全數清倉，反映其對市場趨勢的判斷。
• 美伊戰爭爆發導致航空燃油飆漲，對航空業帶來挑戰，是泰珀清倉航空股的原因之一。
• 泰珀因在股市崩跌時進場抄底並獲豐厚報酬，被稱為「華爾街抄底王」，其持股變動被視為市場風向球。
news.Keywords: 價值投資,科技巨頭,半導體股,部位調整,市場風向球

news.Title: 台股資金潮退卻？投顧：量能仍在可控範圍
news.Content: 台北股市繼上週五下挫逾500點後，今天(18日)一開盤受鄰近亞洲股市開盤走跌影響，不到10分鐘就大跌逾千點，也讓外界質疑台股資金潮是否退卻？國內投 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股因鄰近亞洲股市走跌影響，開盤重挫逾千點，但投顧認為是乖離率過高修正，中長期基本面未變。
• 台股4月創下單月點數與漲幅歷史新高，5月以來持續走升，但技術面面臨修正壓力。
• 川習會實質利多有限，加上美股上週五表現弱勢，影響亞洲股市表現。
• 分析師預期，AI趨勢未變，長線趨勢仍可期，但短期內指數可能陷入震盪整理修正。
• 投顧認為，指數整理過程中量能稍縮在可控範圍，基本面未變，長線趨勢仍可期待；新台幣匯率走貶加大台股壓力。
news.Keywords: 乖離率修正,技術面,基本面,量能,震盪整理

news.Title: 苦守4萬點！國巨市值登台股兆元俱樂部「噴429億成交額霸榜」　這檔傳大單遭搶仍衝274億鉅額

由於美股上周五全面收黑，台股今（18）日開盤下挫76.54點，報41,095.82點，截至中午11時30分 ...

news.Title: Atreides點名亞馬遜Trainium是黑馬，台積電保守擴產成AI防泡沫關鍵
news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】外電報導，科技投資人、Atreides Management投資長貝克(Gavin Baker)在最新訪談中拋出多項挑戰市場共識的AI判斷，直指當前最被低估的AI晶片不是 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 科技投資人認為亞馬遜Trainium是當前最被低估的AI晶片，而非輝達或Google TPU。
• 台積電採取保守擴產策略，有助於全球科技市場避免網路泡沫式的過度投資。
• 台積電的擴產節奏遠低於輝達期望的倍數式擴張，此舉成為市場在狂熱中保留供給紀律的關鍵。
• AI晶片競爭將走向GPU、ASIC、雲端自研晶片並行，對博通、亞馬遜供應鏈等帶來重新定價機會。
• 太空數據中心可能在未來兩年內驗證商業可行性，並對地面數據中心電力與散熱供應商產生影響。

news.Title: This AI Stock Has Every Quality Warren Buffett Looks for in a Long-Term Hold
news.Content: As arguably the most well-known investor in stock market history, it makes sense that people tend to follow Warren Buffett's philosophies and advice when it comes to picking great stocks. No investor is perfect, but Buffett's sustained success over decades before his retirement is, to put it lightly, impressive. Buffett himself isn't the biggest fan of tech stocks, but there are a few artificial ingelligence (AI) stocks that fit the qualities that Buffett looks for in a business. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft (MSFT) exhibits qualities Warren Buffett looks for in a long-term investment, including a strong competitive moat derived from its enterprise software reach (Windows, Office 365, Azure).
• The company has a history of consistently returning value to shareholders, evidenced by 21 consecutive years of dividend increases and significant share buyback programs.
• Microsoft's ingrained presence in business operations creates high switching costs, contributing to its long-term stability and profitability.
• Despite not being a traditional dividend stock, its consistent dividend growth and substantial share repurchases are attractive to long-term investors.
news.Keywords: competitive moat, enterprise software, shareholder value, dividend growth, share buybacks

news.Title: Prediction: This Will Be the Next $5 Trillion Company
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) sits alone as the only company that's worth $5 trillion or more. Still, there's another company knocking on the door of this exclusive club: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) . Alphabet isn't too far off and currently has a market cap of nearly $4.8 trillion, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) is nearing a $5 trillion market capitalization, currently at nearly $4.8 trillion, positioning it as a potential next trillion-dollar company after Nvidia.
• The company has rapidly advanced in AI, becoming a leader with its generative AI models and seamless integration into Google Search, which saw a 19% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1.
• Google Cloud revenue grew by 63% in Q1, boosted by sales of Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) to external clients, establishing it as a key platform for AI application development.
• While Alphabet's stock is up over 25% year-to-date, its valuation is at a decade-high, suggesting capped near-term upside compared to some peers, especially until further AI division growth is realized.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, AI leadership, Google Cloud growth, valuation, revenue acceleration

news.Title: 5 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks That Have More Than Doubled This Year and Can Still Go Higher
news.Content: As the world embraces artificial intelligence (AI), and companies that provide development infrastructure are thriving, AI stocks are driving higher market gains. As a group, the industry is outperforming the market. One standard signal is the Nasdaq-100 , which features trending tech stocks and is beating the S&P 500 this year. Many exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that focus on AI are doing even better. Consider the Roundhill Generative AI and Technology ETF , the iShares U.S. Power and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Several AI stocks have more than doubled this year, outperforming the broader market, with companies like Bloom Energy, Sandisk, Lumentum, Micron Technology, and Intel showing significant gains.
• Bloom Energy reported a 130% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1 and raised full-year guidance, turning operating cash flow positive.
• Sandisk's NAND flash memory products are in high demand for AI data storage, with Q3 FY2026 revenue up 251% year-over-year, driven by a 233% increase in data center revenue.
• Lumentum's optical products are crucial for high-speed data centers, with Q3 FY2026 revenue up 90% year-over-year, and the company reported a GAAP operating profit.
• Micron Technology's revenue increased 70% year-over-year in Q2 FY2026, with earnings per share rising significantly due to demand for memory chips in AI applications.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, revenue growth, data center demand, memory chips, infrastructure providers

news.Title: Another billionaire dumps mega-cap stock for AI bet
news.Content: Stanley Druckenmiller is one of the most-watched money managers on Wall Street , and his Duquesne Family Office Q1 2026 13F filing just landed. The headline number is brutal for Alphabet bulls. Duquesne sold all 385,000 shares of Alphabet ( GOOGL ) Class A stock during the quarter. That same stake had been aggressively built up just one quarter earlier , from roughly 102,000 shares to 385,000. Amazon got the same treatment. Duquesne cut its Amazon ( AMZN ) position from 737,940 shares down to just 9,539 shares, a 99% reduction. Where did the money go? Mostly into Broadcom ( ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stanley Druckenmiller's Duquesne Family Office sold its entire stake in Alphabet (GOOGL) and significantly reduced its Amazon (AMZN) position in Q1 2026.
• The capital from these sales was largely redeployed into Broadcom (AVGO), a key AI custom silicon maker, with a new stake of 195,955 shares.
• Druckenmiller views Broadcom as a strategic AI chip investment, designed to create custom AI accelerators (ASICs) that are more cost-effective than GPUs for specific workloads.
• Broadcom reported Q1 FY2026 AI semiconductor revenue of $8.4 billion, up 106% year-over-year, with guidance for $10.7 billion in AI sales for Q2.
• The exits from Alphabet and Amazon are interpreted as a rotation from crowded mega-cap AI trades into infrastructure plays like Broadcom, rather than a negative call on AI itself.
news.Keywords: portfolio rotation, AI infrastructure, custom silicon, mega-cap exits, strategic investment

news.Title: How Much Will SpaceX Stock Be Worth by 2030? Here's What History Says.
news.Content: With whispers of a valuation approaching $2 trillion, SpaceX stands on the precipice of potentially the largest initial public offering in history. Yet forecasting the company's stock price at 2030 feels more like an astrology project than astute financial analysis. SpaceX must overcome regulatory hurdles and make significant technological leaps over the next few years to meet investors' sky-high expectations. Let's explore where SpaceX stands today, detail the company's vast opportunities, and examine some sobering lessons from recent high-profile IPOs. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is approaching a potential $2 trillion valuation, with projections for the largest IPO in history.
• The company's valuation has rapidly increased, from $350 billion in late 2024 to an estimated $1.5 trillion currently, with an IPO valuation eyed between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion.
• SpaceX's business segments include reusable rockets, Starlink global broadband, and a burgeoning focus on AI infrastructure, leveraging its network and launch capacity for orbital data centers.
• Analysts estimate SpaceX's revenue to be between $15 billion and $18 billion, implying a price-to-sales multiple exceeding 100 based on its IPO valuation.
• The article discusses the potential of SpaceX's AI ambitions and draws parallels with the trajectories of recent tech IPOs like Palantir and Snowflake.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, space technology, AI infrastructure, revenue projections, market potential

news.Title: Warren Buffett Successor Greg Abel Just More Than Tripled Berkshire's Stake in This "Magnificent Seven" Stock. Is It a Buy?
news.Content: When Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRKA) (NYSE: BRKB) filed its first quarterly 13-F under new CEO Greg Abel late last week, one move stood out from the rest: In his first three months running the conglomerate, Abel boosted Berkshire's stake in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) by 224%, lifting the position to nearly 58 million shares worth about $23 billion. That makes the Google parent one of Berkshire's seven largest equity holdings. Of course, the stake was relatively modest ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Greg Abel, Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, more than tripled the company's stake in Alphabet (GOOGL), increasing it by 224% to nearly 58 million shares, now valued at approximately $23 billion.
• Alphabet reported a 22% year-over-year revenue increase in Q1 to $109.9 billion, marking its fastest growth pace in over two years and the 11th consecutive quarter of double-digit growth.
• Operating income jumped 30% to $39.7 billion, with operating margins expanding to 36.1%, driven significantly by Google Cloud's 63% revenue growth to $20 billion and tripled operating income.
• Enterprise AI solutions are a primary growth driver for Google Cloud, with revenue from products built on gen AI models growing nearly 800% year-over-year in Q1.
• Despite substantial capital expenditures ($35.7 billion in Q1) and raised full-year guidance ($180-$190 billion), Alphabet's stock valuation remains reasonable at a P/E ratio around 30, reflecting its accelerating growth and expanding margins.
news.Keywords: stake increase, revenue acceleration, margin expansion, Google Cloud, AI growth driver

news.Title: Is Micron the Next Nvidia?
news.Content: Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) is having a moment. The maker of memory chips just posted second-quarter fiscal 2026 revenue of $23.9 billion, up 196% year over year. Gross margins have scaled up past 70%, a figure that would have seemed absurd for a memory company just three years ago. The stock trades at a forward P/E below 10, while the semiconductor industry median is around 30. If you squint, it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) reported a significant Q2 FY2026 revenue of $23.9 billion, up 196% year-over-year, with gross margins exceeding 70%.
• The company's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) is critical for AI accelerators, with capacity sold out through 2026 and shortages expected next year.
• Micron's return on equity is 40%, and its addressable market could reach $100 billion by 2028, positioning it as a compelling 'pick-and-shovel' play in the AI ecosystem.
• Unlike Nvidia, which designs AI accelerators and controls the software ecosystem, Micron is a component supplier vulnerable to price competition from peers like Samsung and SK Hynix.
• The stock trades at a forward P/E below 10, significantly lower than the semiconductor industry median of around 30, reflecting market concerns about the cyclical nature of the memory market and long-term pricing power.
news.Keywords: memory chips, high-bandwidth memory, AI supply chain, gross margin, valuation discount

news.Title: What Is the Cheapest "Magnificent Seven" Stock?
news.Content: The "Magnificent Seven" group of stocks includes some of the largest companies in the world, all of which are major players in the tech realm. This group is made up of: Nvidia Alphabet Apple Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) Amazon Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) Tesla All seven of these stocks are trillion-dollar companies by market cap. However, each stock varies in how good a deal ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The 'Magnificent Seven' stocks (Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta Platforms, Tesla) are all trillion-dollar companies, but their valuations vary significantly.
• Operating cash flow is identified as the most reliable valuation metric for these companies due to significant capital expenditures and investment gains affecting net income.
• Tesla (95x CFO) and Nvidia (56x CFO) are the most expensive, though Nvidia's strong growth is expected to reduce its multiple.
• Meta Platforms (13x CFO) appears to be the cheapest, trading at a historically low multiple, potentially offering a buying opportunity.
• Microsoft (less than 18x CFO) is also highlighted as a potential value play, trading below its historical average despite strong business performance.
news.Keywords: Magnificent Seven, valuation metrics, operating cash flow, relative valuation, value investing

news.Title: The AI Stock With a 10-Year Head Start That Wall Street Still Hasn't Fully Priced In
news.Content: As the expenses of building and running artificial intelligence (AI) data centers continue to surge, having lower costs is a huge advantage. One of the best ways to achieve this is with custom chips called application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs). ASICs for AI are hardwired chips developed for specific tasks. Not ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) has a significant advantage in AI due to its decade-long development of custom Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), which are more cost-effective and energy-efficient than competitors' GPUs.
• The company has optimized its hardware and software stack around its TPUs, leading to lower costs for training AI models and running inference.
• Alphabet's eighth-generation TPUs offer specialized variations for training (TPU 8t) and inference/agentic AI (TPU 8i), paired with custom Arm-based CPUs.
• The company is beginning to allow select customers to purchase TPUs directly, presenting a new growth avenue.
• Despite its AI leadership and custom silicon, Alphabet's stock is considered undervalued with a forward P/E of 28 on 2026 estimates.
news.Keywords: custom silicon, AI infrastructure, cost advantage, inference, training

news.Title: Snapchat: Don't Rush to Buy This Social Media Stock
news.Content: It's been a tough ride for long-term Snap (NYSE: SNAP) investors. Once touted as a close rival to Meta Platforms ' Instagram, the relatively small social media company remains unprofitable and is down by more than 30% year to date. Investors who are betting on a turnaround ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Snap (SNAP) has struggled, remaining unprofitable and down over 30% year-to-date, making it a less attractive investment compared to Meta Platforms (META).
• Snap's revenue growth rate of 8.8% over the past three years significantly lags Meta's 19.9% CAGR.
• With less than $10 billion in revenue compared to Meta's over $200 billion, Snap faces intense competition from platforms like Instagram and TikTok.
• Despite a 5% year-over-year increase in monthly active users (956 million), Snap needs to improve average revenue per user, which has shown limited progress.
• While Q2 revenue is projected to grow 14.6% year-over-year to $1.535 billion, sequential growth is expected to be flat, indicating persistent growth challenges.
news.Keywords: unprofitable, revenue growth, market share, user monetization, competitive landscape

news.Content: Demand for memory chips has skyrocketed over the past year as big tech companies upped their spending on artificial intelligence (AI) data centers. That's been a huge boon for both Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) and Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) , which have benefited from tremendous pricing power. Earnings at both companies have soared, as have their stock prices. Micron shares are up over 700% in the past 12 months, and Sandisk stock is up a whopping 3,200%. But investors eager to hop on the bandwagon need to be aware ...
news.AI_Summary:

• The memory chip market is heavily influenced by Korean companies Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, which dominate DRAM and NAND markets and lead in High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM).
• These two companies' production capacity decisions significantly impact industry pricing and earnings cycles.
• Samsung is increasing investments in memory chip production, while SK Hynix is expanding existing facilities and collaborating on new ones.
• A potential global production build-out led by Samsung and SK Hynix could negatively impact pricing by 2028, posing a risk to Micron and Sandisk if they cannot offset lower prices with volume.
news.Keywords: memory chips, AI data centers, supply/demand, pricing power, production capacity

news.Title: Where are Amazon’s headquarters? Seattle and beyond
news.Content:
Jef Bezos and his wife, MacKenzie Scott, drove from New York City to Seattle to start Amazon.com in a rented garage. They stayed there and made Washington’s biggest city the headquarters for the world’s biggest online retailer.

Later on, the company grew, and as part of its expansion, it set up a second headquarters on the East Coast.

Here’s where Amazon’s two different headquarters are located and how many people work at each one.

Where is Amazon’s headquarters?

The area of Amazon’s first and original headquarters, which it describes as Puget Sound, in Washington state, consists of office buildings spread out in Seattle and neighboring cities, Bellevue and Redmond.

The center of Amazon’s headquarters is the 37-story Day 1 building in downtown Seattle, and its workspaces offer views of Puget Sound, Lake Union, and the iconic Space Needle. The building takes its name from Amazon’s Day 1 motto, which was first introduced in founder Jeff Bezos ’ 1997 Letter to Shareholders , to focus on customers, prioritize long-term value over short-term corporate profit, and take risks.

As part of an expansion plan, Amazon set up a second headquarters, known as Metropolitan Park, in Arlington, Virginia.

Why did Amazon set up a second headquarters in Virginia?

Amazon continued to grow its online commerce and set its sights on new businesses, and in 2017, it decided to develop a second headquarters outside Seattle to accommodate its rapidly growing workforce. In 2018, it created a shortlist of 20 cities, including New York City, Austin, Texas, and Toronto, Canada, but eventually settled on Arlington, Virginia.

Arlington was selected for a variety of reasons, including the ease of doing business, quality of life, transportation, and access to tech talent, where it can draw from Northern Virginia’s pool of computer science graduates, according to Arlington Economic Development .

Construction of the Arlington headquarters, known as HQ2 or Metropolitan Park, was to be conducted in two phases. Phase 1 began in early 2020 and opened to employees in May 2023. From 2023, work on Phase 2 of the site, nicknamed PenPlace, was temporarily suspended.

How many people work at Amazon’s headquarters?

The Day 1 office building reportedly can hold 1,800 employees. However, the broader Seattle headquarters are home to more than 45,000 workers , according to Candor, a financial wellness platform.

In Arlington, the Metropolitan Park office towers house as many as 14,000 employees

What are the features of Amazon’s headquarters?

The 37-story Day 1 building has 1 million square feet of space and sits on 83,000 square feet of land, according to Seneca Group , which managed the building's development. The building — completed in 2017 — also includes about 9,000 square feet of retail space and 6.5 floors of underground parking. A group of glass-and-steel spherical structures is situated at the base of the building.

Story Continues

Workers who commute by bike can also park their bicycles in what’s known as the bike cage — which has repair stations and charging stations for ebikes, according to a tour of the building by Amazon . Unlike many companies in the Fortune 500, at Amazon, employees are allowed to bring their dogs into the office.

Spatial amenities include a coffee shop and a cafeteria, many conference rooms for teams to meet, and soundproof phone booths.

At Metropolitan Park in Arlington, the two office towers feature 2.1 million square feet of office space, and at street level, 65,000 square feet of retail, public spaces, and more than half a mile of protected bike lanes. The complex also features art installations and rooftop dog terraces.

The two office towers were named “Jasper” and “Merlin” — former code names for Amazon projects, according to Arlington magazine .

Who designed and developed Amazon’s headquarters?

The Day 1 building in Seattle was designed by the global architecture firm NBBJ. The Seneca Group, also based in Seattle, developed the site for Amazon. When Amazon settled on Arlington for its HQ2 site, it called upon Seneca to support development of the project, and the group opened an office in Washington, D.C. in 2019.

ZGF Architects designed Metropolitan Park, while Clark Construction served as the general contractor over the development .

This story was originally published by TheStreet on May 17, 2026, where it first appeared in the Investing section. Add TheStreet as a Preferred Source by clicking here.

news.Title: Why Everyone Is Talking About Lumentum Stock -- and Why Investors Should Care
news.Content: For much of the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, investors focused on the companies building the brains behind AI. But quietly, another critical layer of the AI ecosystem has started emerging as a major investment theme: optical networking. And that shift is putting Lumentum Holdings (NASDAQ: LITE) in the spotlight. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lumentum Holdings (LITE) is emerging as a key player in the AI ecosystem, focusing on optical networking to address data transmission bottlenecks.
• As AI systems scale, the exponential increase in data movement between servers and chips strains traditional copper-based networking, creating an opportunity for optical solutions.
• Lumentum develops optical and photonic technologies that enable faster, more energy-efficient data transmission using light, crucial for AI data centers.
• In Q3 fiscal 2026, Lumentum reported revenue growth of 90% YoY to $808 million, with a 700 basis point improvement in operating margin.
• The company guided for Q4 revenue of approximately $1 billion, indicating sustained growth, and its specialized products require significant engineering expertise, suggesting a strong competitive position.
news.Keywords: optical networking, AI infrastructure, data transmission, bottleneck, revenue growth

news.Title: My Top Artificial Intelligence Stock for Retirees (Hint: It's Not Nvidia)
news.Content: Retirees who want exposure to artificial intelligence (AI) often run into a basic conflict. The companies most closely associated with the theme tend to be volatile and expensive, and they pay little to no dividends. The goal of a retirement portfolio is roughly the opposite: stable cash flow, moderate drawdowns, and enough growth to keep up with inflation. The good news is that one of the largest beneficiaries ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco Systems (CSCO) is presented as a suitable AI infrastructure stock for retirees due to its stability, dividend, and moderate volatility compared to growth stocks like Nvidia.
• Cisco booked approximately $2.1 billion in AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers in April 2026, matching its entire fiscal 2025 AI order total.
• The company raised its fiscal 2026 AI order target to over $5 billion, driven by its Silicon One networking silicon, high-speed optics, and AI-specific switching products.

• Cisco offers a combination of a reliable dividend, share repurchases, and predictable enterprise revenue, making it an attractive option for income-oriented investors seeking AI exposure.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, dividend stock, recurring revenue, hyperscaler orders, enterprise networking

news.Title: Nokia Shares Jumped After Cisco’s Strong Quarterly Results. NOK Could Be the Next Networking Winner.
news.Content:
Networking stocks got a serious boost this week after Cisco (CSCO) put up a strong fiscal Q3 2026 report. On May 13, the company posted networking revenue of $8.82 billion, up 25%, thanks to heavy spending on AI infrastructure and campus networking gear.

The market liked what it saw. Cisco shares jumped between 18% and 22% in after-hours trading, and that enthusiasm spread quickly across the sector. Nokia (NOK) climbed more than 10%, which is notable because the company is starting to shake off its old image as just a legacy telecom business.

More News from Barchart

NVDA Earnings, Alphabet Conference and Other Can't Miss Items this Week

Microsoft Stock Is an AI Bargain That Investors Are Missing

A $1.5 Trillion Reason to Buy Taiwan Semi Stock Here

Tired of missing midday reversals? The FREE Barchart Brief newsletter keeps you in the know. Sign up now!

This wasn't just traders piling into anything networking-related. AI buildouts are picking up speed, with major cloud companies planning to spend hundreds of billions in 2026 to handle larger training clusters and inference workloads.

So here's the real question. If Cisco's results show that networking demand is heating up again, does Nokia have what it takes to be the next big winner in this space? Let's dive in.

Can Nokia's Financials Justify the Rally?

Nokia Corporation, based in Espoo, Finland, has a market value of about $83 billion and builds telecom equipment, optical gear, and network software for carriers, enterprises, and data centers. The Finnish gear maker is positioned to benefit when spending on connectivity, AI, and carrier infrastructure strengthens across global markets.

As for the stock, NOK is up about 116% since the year started, 169% gain over the past 52 weeks, and closed at $13.98 on May 15.

Even so, the valuation looks a bit rich. It trades at 33.72x trailing earnings and 27.59x cash flow, both above sector medians of 24.52x and 18.01x.

Its latest quarterly report, released in March 2026, helped support the bullish view. Nokia posted $0.06 in earnings per share, while sales came in at $5.26 billion, down 25.60% quarter-to-quarter, so revenue was softer even though the company stayed profitable.

That same quarter also showed stronger cash generation. Their operating cash flow rose to $578 million, up about 30% from the prior quarter, which suggests the core business was holding up better.

It also reported net cash flow of -$1.31B, but that was still an improvement of 17% from the prior quarter. That means cash outflows narrowed, which matters for a company still spending on network upgrades and growth projects.

Story Continues

What's Driving Nokia's Growth Beyond the Rally?

Nokia is going after a bigger share of AI and networking spending, and the moves it's making go beyond just the quarterly numbers. Right now, the big headline is a $4 billion investment commitment with the Trump administration to expand research and manufacturing in the U.S. That's on top of the $2.3 billion Nokia is already putting into U.S. manufacturing as part of its Infinera acquisition.

The company also locked in a strategic AI-RAN partnership with Nvidia (NVDA), which is starting to show real progress. Nokia and Nvidia finished functional tests of GPU-powered AI-RAN workloads with T-Mobile (TMUS), Indosat (ISAT), and SoftBank @ (SFTBY), proving that AI and radio access network functions can run at the same time on shared infrastructure.

This partnership now includes operators like BT Group (BT.A), Elisa (ELISA.H.DX), NTT DOCOMO, and Vodafone (VOD), all testing AI-RAN tech to improve network performance and handle the surge in mobile AI traffic. Nokia has also brought in hardware partners like Quanta and SuperMicro (SMCI), along with Dell Technologies (DELL) and Red Hat for orchestration, which gives telecom companies more options when choosing servers.

In May 2026, Nokia rolled out AI tools for home and broadband networks, drawing on experience from more than 600 million broadband lines it's deployed around the world. The telecom industry is expected to pour $6.2 billion into this kind of AI by 2030, and Nokia's new systems are built to push first-contact help desk success rates above 50% and cut repeat construction site visits in half.

Nokia Federal Solutions and Lockheed Martin (LMT), also teamed up to introduce a mission-critical 5G solution for the U.S. Department of Defense, using open architecture standards. This modular 5G setup brings Nokia's carrier-grade 5G into the DoW's framework, so military vehicles and platforms can tap into commercial 5G while in the field.

What Are Analysts Saying About Nokia?

Nokia's next earnings report is set for July 23. Analysts are expecting $0.07 per share for the June quarter, up from $0.05 last year, which works out to a 40% jump year-over-year.

Wall Street is starting to treat Nokia as a real AI and networking play, and the recent upgrades show it. Bank of America shifted its rating from “Neutral” to “Buy,” pointing to Nokia's shift into optical networking after the Infinera deal and some key leadership changes.

Argus also upgraded Nokia to Buy after the last quarterly release, setting a $15 price target, which gives the stock about 7.6% upside from here.

The wider analyst group is on board, too. Based on 18 analysts surveyed, Nokia holds a consensus “Moderate Buy” rating with an average price target of $12.89. That sits about 7.5% below the current stock price, which shows just how fast the rally has moved ahead of expectations.

Conclusion

Nokia's rally after Cisco's big quarter is more than just traders chasing momentum for a day. With a $4 billion U.S. investment on the table, the Nvidia AI-RAN partnership is gaining traction, and analyst upgrades pointing to 40% earnings growth, there's real substance backing the move. The big question is whether Nokia can actually convert the AI infrastructure opportunity into better margins and steady revenue gains. For now, the pieces are coming together in a way that suggests this rally might still have legs.

news.Title: As Broadcom Eclipses $2 Trillion, Private Credit Giants Wants In
news.Content:
Key Points

Interested in Broadcom Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

Broadcom has performed exceptionally well as of late, surging to a market capitalization above $2 trillion.

Amid this, reports have surfaced that the company is in talks to receive tens of billions in private credit funding.

See what the report signals about Broadcom's outlook and what it could mean for the company's balance sheet.

Over the past several weeks, semiconductor giant Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) has entered rarified air, with its market capitalization eclipsing $2 trillion. Broadcom is now one of just six companies in the world in this territory, becoming more valuable than giants like Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA).

Notably, shares fell below $300 in late March, a level not seen since September 2025. Broadcom has since rebounded mightily, closing at or above $430 multiple times in May. Overall, Broadcom shares are closing in on a 50% gain since March lows.

→ 3 Crucial Aerospace Component Makers That Analysts Love

An interesting report recently surfaced around the firm, with potential implications that could be both positive and negative.

According to Bloomberg, the company is in discussions with two alternative asset management giants to receive billions in debt funding.

→ 3 Stocks to Own If Gas Prices Keep Rising

While this move signals confidence in Broadcom’s outlook for its artificial intelligence (AI) chips, it also raises questions, given the company’s already significant debt levels.

Broadcom, Blackstone, and Apollo: Private Credit Eyes AI Infrastructure

Asset management companies Blackstone (NYSE: BX) and Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) are reportedly in talks with Broadcom to provide $35 billion in private credit funding. Details around the potential deal are minimal, but the funds would reportedly support Broadcom’s AI chip development roadmap.

→ Peloton Stock Gives Back Gains After Upbeat Earnings Report

From Broadcom’s perspective, this indicates that the company is highly confident in the demand for its chips going forward. $35 billion is no small sum; the agreement would be one of the largest private credit deals ever. It is unlikely that Broadcom would engage in the deal without strong multi-year visibility.

The report also signals confidence in Broadcom’s future from Blackstone and Apollo—lenders who surely want to recoup their principal with meaningful interest over time.

Broadcom’s Already Debt Sits Above $60B

Near the end of 2023, Broadcom acquired VMware in a deal worth $69 billion. The acquisition has been a clear success. Since VMware came onto Broadcom’s books in its fiscal Q1 2024, its quarterly infrastructure software revenue has increased from $4.75 billion to $6.78 billion. That is good for a strong compound annual growth rate of just under 20%. Broadcom has also significantly improved VMware’s margins, cutting costs while also increasing prices.

Story Continues

However, the deal also greatly increased Broadcom’s debt. Between its fiscal Q4 2023 and fiscal Q1 2024, Broadcom’s total debt nearly doubled from $39.6 billion to $75.9 billion. Notably, Broadcom has made solid headway in reducing its debt since then, with the figure falling by around 13% to $66.1 billion last quarter. Adding $35 billion in private credit financing could put its total debt near $100 billion, far greater than post-VMware heights.

Still, raw debt levels themselves don’t tell the full story of Broadcom’s solvency situation. One key metric of balance sheet health is the Net Debt to EBITDA ratio. This is also called the “Leverage Ratio."

Balance Sheet Breakdown: Broadcom’s Theoretical Leverage Ratio

Note that: Net Debt/EBITDA = (Total Debt – Cash) / (Quarterly EBITDA x 4)

With 66.1 billion in total debt, $14.2 billion in cash and equivalents, and fiscal Q1 EBITDA of $10.8 billion, Broadcom’s Net Debt/EBITDA ratio is roughly 1.2x. This is healthy. For reference, S&P Global recently evaluated the theoretical health of Texas Instruments' (NASDAQ: TXN) balance sheet after a proposed acquisition. S&P said Texas Instruments would have “a strong balance sheet with net debt to EBITDA comfortably below 1.5x following transaction close.”

Adding $35 billion in debt would shoot Broadcom’s figure up to 2x. While certainly more elevated, this is not particularly problematic. Leverage ratios below 3x are generally acceptable.

Furthermore, it’s unlikely that Broadcom would draw down this debt all at once. Additionally, as is common with private credit deals, a significant portion of the debt may never actually go on Broadcom’s balance sheet. Lastly, Broadcom is growing its EBITDA rapidly. Its last 12 months' EBITDA rose by 54.5% YOY as of last quarter. With strong growth expected to continue, its leverage ratio could improve quickly.

Broadcom Remains on Strong Footing

Overall, if Broadcom were to engage in this private credit deal, its balance sheet would still be in good shape. This makes the idea that Broadcom is considering the deal to pursue growth initiatives not overly worrisome.

Notably, Broadcom shares gained significantly, by around 4.2%, on the day Bloomberg released this report. However, chip stocks in general showed strength that day, with the iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ: SOXX) rising more than 5%. At a minimum, this reaction indicates that markets did not view the report as a large negative for Broadcom, consistent with this analysis. Still, it will be worth watching how the market reacts should the deal actually materialize.

The article " As Broadcom Eclipses $2 Trillion, Private Credit Giants Wants In " was originally published by MarketBeat.
